data.title: South Korea Considers Seizing Principal in Virtual Asset Insider Trading Cases
data.description:
South Korea's financial regulators are contemplating the inclusion of a clause to seize the principal in virtual asset insider trading cases in the upcoming second phase of legislation expected later this year. According to PANews, under the current Virtual Asset User Protection Act, the government can only confiscate investment principal in cases of fraudulent transactions or market manipulation. There is no legal basis for seizing the principal in insider trading cases.

The Financial Supervisory Service has recently submitted this issue to the Financial Services Commission, which is currently reviewing whether to incorporate it into the second phase of the law. In the stock market, all improper trading crimes can result in the confiscation of the investment principal.

data.title: Rory McIlroy's Chances to Win 2026 US Masters Surge to 70% on Polymarket
data.description: According to NS3.AI, the probability of Rory McIlroy winning the 2026 US Masters has increased significantly on Polymarket, reaching 70% after a 46% rise within 24 hours. The trading volume for the 2026 US Masters Champion contract has surpassed $107 million, indicating strong investor interest and activity.

data.title: Polymarket's odds of "Rory McIlroy winning the 2026 Masters Tournament" have risen to 70%, a 46% increase in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of Rory McIlroy winning the 2026 Masters Tournament on Polymarket has risen to 70%, a 46% increase in 24 hours. As of now, the total value of contracts for the "2026 Masters Tournament Winner" event has exceeded $107 million. The rules for this event contract are as follows: settlement is based on the player who wins the 2026 Masters Tournament. If a player is eliminated according to the official rules of the tournament, the relevant market will be settled as "No." In the event of a tie, settlement will be based on the winner determined by the official rules of the Masters Tournament. If no winner is announced by December 31, 2026, the settlement will be "Other." The settlement is primarily based on the official results published on the PGA Tour website and the Masters Tournament website, and may also consider consensus from other reliable reports. The 90th Masters Tournament 2026 officially teed off this week at Augusta National Golf Club. Defending champion Rory McIlroy shot a 67, tying for the lead with American Sam Burns after the first round. Chinese player Li Haotong carded a 71, tied for 10th. After the first day of competition, Australian Jason Day, Japanese-American Kurt Kitayama, and 2018 Masters champion Patrick Reed are all tied for third with 69s. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: The grayscale update is considering including product tokens, adding assets such as HYPE, STX, and VIRTUAL.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports that Grayscale has updated its list of crypto assets under consideration for future investment products, according to a post on its website. The latest list includes Bitcoin and XRP in the Currencies category; Stacks, Sui, Toncoin, and Tron in the Smart Contract Platforms category; Ethena, Hyperliquid, and Jupiter in the Financials category; Dogecoin and Decentraland in the Consumer & Culture category; Worldcoin, Virtuals Protocol, Story, and Grass in the AI ​​category; and Chainlink, LayerZero, and Helium in the Utilities & Services category. Grayscale stated that the list is evaluated quarterly to provide investors with diversified digital asset investment options.

data.title: Kamala Harris Considers 2028 Presidential Run
data.description: Kamala Harris has indicated that she might run for president in 2028. According to NS3.AI, Harris made this comment during the National Action Network conference held in New York City. Her statement has sparked discussions about her potential candidacy in the upcoming presidential election.

data.title: Harris said she is "considering" running for the 2028 US presidential election.
data.description: According to NBC News, at the National Action Network conference in New York City, former Vice President Kamala Harris, when asked about running for president in 2028, said, "I might. I'm thinking about it." This is Harris's strongest and most direct statement on the question of whether she is considering running again. (Jinshi)

data.title: Putin: Russia needs to develop its own large-scale language model to safeguard the country's development process.
data.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin stated on the 10th, while attending a government meeting on the development of artificial intelligence technology, that large language models have become a fundamental, end-to-end technology for development across all sectors of the country. He pointed out, "Only by possessing our own independent models can we confidently move forward, ensure security and defense capabilities, and remain at the forefront of scientific and engineering thought. Moreover, Russia is one of the few countries in the world with unique expertise in this field." Putin also mentioned that so-called open-source solutions are often used to develop language models. He explained, "Developers from various countries share complete algorithm libraries, and the resources of this cooperation and partnership should naturally be effectively utilized." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Putin Advocates for Independent Language Models to Enhance National Security
data.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin emphasized the necessity for Russia to develop independent large language models to bolster national development and safeguard security and defense capabilities. According to NS3.AI, Putin also highlighted the importance of utilizing open-source algorithm libraries from developers across various countries to achieve these objectives.

data.title: Immutable X to Unlock 9.62 Million Tokens on April 18
data.description: Immutable X (IMX) is set to unlock approximately 9.62 million tokens on April 18 at 8 a.m. UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this information comes from Web3 asset data platform RootData's token unlocking data.

data.title: Bitwise has submitted its second revised filing, and the Hyperliquid ETF is expected to be listed soon.
data.description: Bitwise has filed a second revised filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for its spot Hyperliquid ETF. The filing adds the trading ticker symbol BHYP and sets the management fee at 0.67%. Eric Balchunas noted that these updates typically signal an imminent product launch. Currently, Bitwise, Grayscale, and 21Shares are all vying for the first Hyperliquid spot ETF. Bitwise previously stated in its December 2026 revised filing that the fund would seek to generate additional returns through HYPE staking. CoinGecko data shows that the price of HYPE has risen 65% since the beginning of 2026 and is currently around $41.96.

data.title: RAVE Experiences Significant Price Surge
data.description: RAVE has recently experienced a notable increase in its market value, surpassing $2.1 and currently trading at $2.09. According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency has seen a daily increase of over 100% and a three-day surge exceeding 700%.

data.title: RAVE broke through $2.1, surging over 100% intraday and more than 700% in three days.
data.description: Market data shows that RAVE has broken through $2.1 and is currently trading at $2.09, up more than 100% on the day and more than 700% in three days.

data.title: Eurozone's Oil Price Sensitivity Exceeds That of the U.S., Bank of America Reports
data.description: The Eurozone exhibits a significantly higher sensitivity to oil price fluctuations compared to the United States, according to a report by Bank of America. The study reveals that a 10% increase in oil prices results in an inflation impact of approximately 40 basis points and a growth impact exceeding 10 basis points in the Eurozone. These effects are roughly double those observed in the U.S. According to Jin10, the report attributes this heightened sensitivity to the larger share of energy in the European consumer basket and the region's status as a net importer of oil.

data.title: Vance leads US negotiating delegation to Pakistan
data.description: A U.S. negotiating delegation led by Vice President Vance arrived at the Nur Khan Air Force Base in Rawalpindi, a city near Islamabad, the capital of Pakistan, on the 11th. (Xinhua)

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows Amid Market Activity
data.description: U.S. Solana spot ETFs experienced a notable increase in net inflows, totaling $11.453 million yesterday. According to NS3.AI, the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF was the sole fund contributing to these net inflows, highlighting its appeal among investors.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Baidu Smart Cloud Launches Embodied Intelligence Data Marketplace
data.description: On April 11, Baidu Smart Cloud announced the launch of its Embodied Intelligence Data Marketplace (Beta version) in collaboration with several embodied intelligence companies, including Ling Sheng Technology, Fourier, Wei Tai Technology, Tuo Yuan Wisdom, Shu Tu Technology, and Song Ying Technology. According to Jin10, this marketplace introduces a pioneering hierarchical and scalable data labeling system designed to accelerate the large-scale implementation of embodied intelligence. Currently, Baidu Smart Cloud is providing services to over 30 embodied intelligence enterprises, including Zhi Yuan and Yu Shu.

data.title: XRP's Potential Recovery Amid Market Indicators
data.description:
XRP has been experiencing an eight-month downtrend, with momentum and on-chain indicators reaching levels that have historically aligned with macro bottoms. According to Cointelegraph, data from TradingView shows that the relative strength index (RSI) of the XRP/BTC ratio is at 24, marking the most oversold level since October 2025. Historically, such low RSI levels have signaled market bottoms for the ratio, leading to significant XRP price breakouts against Bitcoin, as observed in late 2024 and 2025.

The XRP/BTC pair is currently trading within a long consolidation range, which has previously served as a strong launching pad for the ratio. The last significant bottom for XRP against Bitcoin in this zone occurred in June 2025, initiating a 61% increase in the XRP/BTC ratio and a 92% XRP price rally to a multi-year high of $3.66. Other instances highlighted by the yellow bars in the chart further emphasize the reliability of this level in marking macro bottoms for XRP/BTC.

The MVRV Z-score for XRP is near zero, a level that historically aligns with accumulation zones and market bottoms. This suggests that most holders are close to breakeven, reducing sell pressure and indicating potential downside exhaustion. Similar patterns were observed in 2021, 2022, and 2024 before major rallies. Notably, the last time XRP’s MVRV Z-score fell to similar levels in late 2024, it coincided with a macro market bottom at $0.30 and preceded a multi-month rally, with the XRP/USD pair rising 500% to a multi-year high above $3.

Currently, the 0.80 MVRV pricing band, which has historically marked cycle bottoms, is at $1.14, coinciding with a 15-month low reached on February 6. These on-chain metrics suggest that XRP is undervalued and may continue its recovery, potentially rising toward $1.70 or higher. Meanwhile, XRP/USD remains cautiously bullish as long as it holds the $1.25-$1.30 support zone. A trader noted that if this zone continues to hold, a short-term bounce towards $1.45 is possible.

The importance of this support level is reinforced by cost basis distribution, with nearly 1.73 billion XRP acquired around this price. Below this, the next line of defense is the $1.15 demand zone, where the 200-week simple moving average is located. If XRP/USD drops below this level, it could fall toward the bear flag target of $0.80, or 41% below the current price. As Cointelegraph reported, maintaining the $1.27-$1.30 range would indicate strength among the bulls, who must push the XRP/USD pair toward the $1.61 range high to regain control.

data.title: Air India Faces Operational Challenges Amid Record Losses, Says Tata Sons Chairman
data.description: Air India is currently experiencing significant operational challenges and record losses, according to Tata Sons Chairman Natarajan Chandrasekaran. Bloomberg posted on X that Chandrasekaran addressed employees on Friday, highlighting the difficulties the airline is facing in its efforts to improve performance and rectify ongoing issues. The carrier is working to overcome these hurdles as it seeks to stabilize its operations and financial standing.
